summary_ja: 完全飽和日。187 raw記事のうち新規AI関連記事は全て他パイプラインで処理済み。active-crawlが3ページ作成+1強化（State of Open Source AI 2026、VulnHunter、LoRA Speedrun、Ollama資金調達）、blog-wiki-ingestがSam Altman 2022メール処理、entity-wiki-create/enrichがVAST Data+Meta-Anthropic取引処理、newsletter-wiki-ingestが1take+1ref処理。dreaming-wiki-ingestにtakes無し。

decisions.title: Saturation day — all articles processed by adjacent pipelines
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★★★ 飽和日。active-crawlが3ページ作成+1強化、blog-wiki-ingestが1件処理、entity-wiki-create/enrichが2件処理、newsletter-wiki-ingestが1take+1ref処理。raw-backlog-ingestはTakes=0。187 raw記事のうち新規AI関連記事は全て他パイプラインで処理済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: Saturation day: all 187 raw articles processed by active-crawl (3 new pages + 1 enrichment), blog-wiki-ingest (1 take), entity-wiki-create/enrich (2 items), newsletter-wiki-ingest (1 take + 1 ref). Zero unprocessed AI-relevant articles remain.

decisions.title: State of Open Source AI 2026 — already created by active-crawl
decisions.reason_ja: active-crawlが2026-07-20にconcepts/state-of-open-source-ai-2026.mdを作成済み。Mozilla V1.0レポート、3.3%能力ギャップ、50x推論コスト削減等の詳細をカバー。

decisions.title: VulnHunter — Capital One's agentic AI code security tool
decisions.reason_ja: active-crawlが2026-07-20にconcepts/vulnhunter-agentic-code-security.mdを作成済み。Claude Code skills使用、falsification engine、Apache 2.0。

decisions.title: LoRA Speedrun — public wall-clock leaderboard for fine-tuning
decisions.reason_ja: active-crawlが2026-07-20にconcepts/ai-benchmarks/lora-speedrun.mdを作成済み。modded-nanogpt哲学をLoRA fine-tuningに適用、Qwen2.5-1.5B GSM8Kベンチマーク。

decisions.title: Ollama $65M Series A — already enriched by active-crawl
decisions.reason_ja: active-crawlが2026-07-20にconcepts/local-llm/ollama.mdをFunding Historyセクションで強化済み。$65M Series A、8.9M開発者、Kitematic創業史。

decisions.title: Sam Altman 2022 email on open source preemption strategy
decisions.reason_ja: blog-wiki-ingestが2026-07-20に処理済み。Sam Altmanの2022年OpenAI取締役会メール（GPT-3ローカルモデル戦略、Stability先行阻止意図）。

decisions.title: VAST Data — new entity page + newsletter interview
decisions.reason_ja: entity-wiki-createが2026-07-20にVAST Data entity page作成済み。newsletter-wiki-ingestのtakeも同一エンティティ。
decisions.body_excerpt: Entity page created by entity-wiki-create on 2026-07-20. VAST Data GPU data layer optimization, Sven Breuner interview coverage.

decisions.title: Qwen 3.8 — 2.4T parameter MoE model
decisions.reason_ja: concepts/qwen-3-8.mdが2026-07-19に作成済み。2.4T MoE、Qwenファミリー最大、Kimi K3との比較。
